study_set.name: The core Brachypodium distachyon root-associated microbiome
study_set.description: The goal of this project was to define the core root-associated microbiome of the model grass Brachypodium distachyon and use this information to target novel biofertiliser candidates.
study_set.title: The core Brachypodium distachyon root-associated microbiome
